svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="JY-1xWXuEYKjOuxmr4kB"> <mxGraphModel dx="1269" dy="658" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="APIInvoker (urls.py)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="370" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- command: Command" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="230" x="370" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ set_command(command)
+ execute_command()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="230" x="370" y="255" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#333333;" value="<<interface>>
Command" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="210" x="690" y="195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ execute()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="210" x="690" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="DataStore (Receiver)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="60" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- _productos: list
- _ventas: list
- _compras: list" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="230" x="60" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ add_venta(data)
+ add_compra(data)
+ descontar_stock(pid, cant)
+ sumar_stock(pid, cant)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="230" x="60" y="515" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="RegistrarVentaCommand" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="400" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- receiver: DataStore
- producto_id: int
- cantidad: int" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="230" x="400" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ execute()
 → receiver.add_venta()
 → receiver.descontar_stock()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="230" x="400" y="515" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="RegistrarCompraCommand" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="700" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- receiver: DataStore
- producto_id: int
- cantidad: int
- costo_unitario: int" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="230" x="700" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ execute()
 → receiver.add_compra()
 → receiver.sumar_stock()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="230" x="700" y="525" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=15;" value="Client (ventas/views.py
compras/views.py)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="230" x="370" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="ventas_list() → POST
compras_list() → POST" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="230" x="370" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="16" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;" target="5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;endFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="515" y="410" /> <mxPoint x="795" y="410" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="13" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;endFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint x="790" y="290" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="16" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="10"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="310" y="60" /> <mxPoint x="310" y="160" /> <mxPoint x="320" y="160" /> <mxPoint x="320" y="440" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="16" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="13"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1030" y="60" /> <mxPoint x="1030" y="440" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#9673a6;" target="7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="13" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#9673a6;" target="7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="815" y="390" /> <mxPoint x="175" y="390" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram>
